data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"schema_version":2,"epicId":"3aaa-0238","generatedAt":"2026-04-27T00:00:00Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"CI-enforced quality gates: staged CI pipeline with LLM review and GitHub Ruleset enforcement","description":"## Context\n\nDSO plugin users \u2014 primarily AI agents running in Claude Code worktree sessions, and secondarily human developers using the plugin \u2014 face a commit workflow enforced by local pre-commit hooks and PreToolUse hooks (test gate, review gate, lint, format). For agents, test suites hit Claude Code's ~73s Bash timeout ceiling, requiring elaborate workarounds. For both agents and humans, local enforcement lives alongside the actor it's guarding, requiring elaborate safeguards (Layer 2 bypass ...","successCriteria":["Direct pushes to main blocked after onboarding","PRs require lint, format, tests, LLM review checks","CI as separate needs:-chained jobs","LLM review: Secrets/Variables/3 tiers/Anthropic-only","Onboarding configures Ruleset + CI + pre-flight","Timeout + bypass actor for outages","E2E PR-lifecycle test","validate.sh --ci as separate required CI job (G7-M3)","ticket-platform-matrix.yml fires on every PR; 3 legs in Ruleset (G8-M3)","Linux-only BASH_OPTS=-eo pipefail test job (G12-M3)"]},"researchFindings":[{"capability":"GitHub Rulesets API (gh api POST /repos/{owner}/{repo}/rulesets --input ruleset.json)","status":"verified","source":"live spike 2026-04-06 against JoeOakhartNava/dso-spike-ci-rulesets","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"GitHub Ruleset required status checks block PR merge until green","status":"verified","source":"live spike 2026-04-06; mergeStateStatus BLOCKED -> CLEAN transition observed","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"GitHub Ruleset bypass actor (RepositoryRole actor_id 5 = admin) configured via PATCH","status":"verified","source":"live spike 2026-04-06","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"GitHub Actions needs: chain (lint -> tests -> LLM review)","status":"verified","source":"live spike 2026-04-06; downstream jobs skipped on upstream failure","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"Default branch detection via gh repo view --json defaultBranchRef","status":"verified","source":"live spike 2026-04-06","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"gh pr merge --auto with auto-merge enabled via gh repo edit --enable-auto-merge","status":"verified","source":"live spike 2026-04-06","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"anthropics/claude-code-action GitHub Action for in-CI LLM review","status":"verified","source":"https://github.com/anthropics/claude-code-action production-ready as of 2026-04","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"GitHub Variables for tier-specific model IDs + GitHub Secrets for API keys","status":"verified","source":"GitHub Actions docs; standard pattern","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"Rulesets require GitHub Pro for private repos; public repos work on Free","status":"verified","source":"live spike 2026-04-06 + GitHub plan docs","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-06T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"Removing path filter on pull_request trigger to make ticket-platform-matrix.yml a required PR check (G8-M3)","status":"verified","source":"GitHub Actions docs on workflow triggers; pattern is editing existing workflow file","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-27T00:00:00Z"},{"capability":"Linux-only CI job with BASH_OPTS='-eo pipefail' to surface SIGPIPE divergences (G12-M3)","status":"verified","source":"docs/proposed-mitigations-4-26.md G12 analysis; observed pattern in DSO codebase","skill_name":"brainstorm","timestamp":"2026-04-27T00:00:00Z"}],"stories":[{"id":"d025-87d4","title":"As a project maintainer, I can run lint, test, and review checks on every PR via a staged CI workflow","priority":1,"classification":"modify","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CI workflow template with 3 needs:-chained jobs (lint -> tests -> LLM review)","Commands resolve without DSO plugin in CI runner","validate-ci job is a separate Actions job with needs:tests, exits non-zero on validate.sh --ci failure (added 2026-04-26)","unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Consumer Impact] validate.sh --ci runs DSO plugin self-tests meaningful only when plugins/dso/ is present; scope/document subset for host-project CI","[Maintainability] check-context naming coordination across 4 stories; use single source-of-truth artifact (see fc8b-aab0)"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC3, SC8"},{"id":"fc8b-aab0","title":"As a project maintainer, I can provision a GitHub Ruleset that blocks direct pushes and requires CI status checks","priority":1,"classification":"modify","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Script creates Ruleset blocking direct pushes","Default branch detection + bypass actor configured","Pre-flight with manual-guide fallback when admin scope absent","Required-check list expands from 4 to 11: lint, format, tests, LLM review, validate-ci, linux-bash4, macos-bash3, alpine-busybox, pipefail-strict (added 2026-04-26)","Single source-of-truth check-context name artifact (e.g., .github/required-checks.txt) consumed by Ruleset provisioner and asserted against actual workflow job IDs in CI","Pre-flight validates RepositoryRole actor_id 5 resolves to Admin on target repo (portability)","unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Implicit Shared State] check-context naming contract shared across d025-87d4, 792b-eb80, 4383-9234","[Conflicting Assumptions] hardcoded actor_id 5 may not resolve to Admin on org repos with custom roles"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["d025-87d4"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1, SC5, SC6, SC8, SC9, SC10"},{"id":"bea2-bd5e","title":"As a project maintainer, I can run LLM-powered code review on PRs with configurable model tiers","priority":1,"classification":"reuse","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["claude-code-action wired with Secrets and Variables","3 tiers (light/standard/frontier) independently configurable","Variable validation and explicit error handling for missing/invalid IDs","unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] explicit timeout-minutes","[Testing] pin Action by SHA"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["d025-87d4"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC2, SC4, SC6"},{"id":"792b-eb80","title":"As a project maintainer, I can rely on platform compatibility being validated as a required PR check","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["ticket-platform-matrix.yml fires on every PR (path filter on pull_request trigger removed/broadened)","Three legs (linux-bash4, macos-bash3, alpine-busybox) appear as PR check contexts","Leg names match Ruleset required-check list (coordinated with fc8b-aab0)","unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] existing legs may be red (G8-M1 covers fixes); ship behind continue-on-error first OR sequence after G8-M1 fixes","[Maintainability] coordinate check-context naming with fc8b-aab0","[Consumer Impact] scope path-filter removal to pull_request trigger only; preserve push/schedule filters to avoid main-branch CI cost regression"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["d025-87d4"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC9"},{"id":"4383-9234","title":"As a project maintainer, I can rely on a Linux-strict pipefail CI job to surface SIGPIPE failures invisible on macOS","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Linux-only CI job exporting BASH_OPTS='-eo pipefail' runs the test suite on every PR","Job emits stable check-context name for inclusion in Ruleset","Synthetic SIGPIPE-class regression test (canary) demonstrates divergence detection works","unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Reliability] existing tests may have pipefail-incompatible patterns; ship the job WITHOUT continue-on-error and outside the Ruleset's required list first; flip to required only after green","[Performance] approximately doubles per-PR CI cost; consider scoping to bash-script test subset","[Testing] canary test belongs in tests/ as a permanent fixture"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["d025-87d4"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC10"},{"id":"a592-0992","title":"As a project being onboarded, I get a GitHub repo configured with CI workflow and Ruleset in one step","priority":2,"classification":"modify","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Onboarding configures CI workflow file + Ruleset + auto-merge","Bootstrap sequence correct (CI workflow merged before Ruleset creation)","Pre-flight fallback works (manual setup guide on missing admin scope)","unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Ordering Violation] now also depends on 792b-eb80 and 4383-9234 \u2014 those stories produce the platform-matrix and pipefail-strict check contexts referenced by the Ruleset; without them merged, PRs hang on phantom required checks"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["d025-87d4","fc8b-aab0","bea2-bd5e","792b-eb80","4383-9234"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC5"},{"id":"5f8f-ddac","title":"As a project maintainer, I can validate CI enforcement works via an E2E test","priority":2,"classification":"modify","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["Full PR lifecycle test: create branch, push, open PR, verify checks appear, assert merge blocked while pending, assert merge succeeds after green","E2E asserts each of 11 named contexts posts a conclusion (not 'pending') AND Ruleset blocks merge on synthetic single-check failure","Cleanup runs even on failure","unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic"],"considerations":["[Testing] requires live GitHub repo; rate-limit aware","[Consumer Impact] phantom-check detection (test (a)) is the load-bearing assertion against name drift"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["a592-0992"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC7"},{"id":"7601-5dfa","title":"Update project docs to reflect CI-enforced quality gates","priority":3,"classification":"reuse","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["CLAUDE.md updated with CI-enforced gate flow","Config docs updated"],"considerations":[],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["d025-87d4","fc8b-aab0","bea2-bd5e","a592-0992","5f8f-ddac","792b-eb80","4383-9234"],"satisfiesCriterion":"all"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":8,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["d025-87d4","fc8b-aab0","bea2-bd5e","792b-eb80","4383-9234","a592-0992","5f8f-ddac","7601-5dfa"]}}
